title: Thailand women's national ice hockey team
summary: The Thailand women's national ice hockey team is the women's national ice hockey team in Thailand.
text:
The Thailand women's national ice hockey team is the women's national ice hockey team in Thailand.

Tournament record
World Championships
2024 – 41st place (1st in Division IIIB)
2025 – 34th place (2nd in Division IIIA)
2026 – 36th place (2nd in Division IIIA)

Asian Winter Games
2017 Asian Winter Games – 5th place
2025 – 6th place

IIHF Challenge Cup of Asia
2014 – 2nd place
2015 – 2nd place
2016 – 2nd place
2017 – 2nd place
2018 – 3rd place
2019 – 1st place
2023 – 1st place

SEA Games
2025 – 1st place
